backend/DirectionType.mo: Defines a simple Motoko module exporting a `DirectionType` variant with `#up` and `#down` values.
backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing market data storage, user profile management, HTTP outcalls for Binance data, access control, and snapshot caching.
backend/MarketData.mo: Defines a `MarketData` type with symbol, price, volume, and direction fields, importing `DirectionType`.
backend/Theme.mo: Defines a `Theme` variant type with `#darkNeon` and `#cyberGlow` options.
backend/UserPreferences.mo: Defines `UserPreferences` and `UserPreferencesInput` types for storing user theme, favourites, alerts, and language settings.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (real-time dashboard, SMC indicators, technical indicators, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary of the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file serving as the frontend entry stylesheet.
frontend/index.html: PWA-enabled HTML entry point with comprehensive iOS/Android meta tags, splash screens, icons, and manifest link for the Crypto Market Assistant app.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for the Crypto Market Assistant defining icons, display mode, shortcuts for Mercado/Recomendações/AI Paper Trading/Pesquisa tabs, and app metadata.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker (v9) that caches static assets on install, cleans old caches on activate, and handles fetch events with a cache-first strategy for a crypto market PWA.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query, theme, and a tabbed navigation layout with lazy-loaded page components (Market, Recommendations, AI Paper Trading, Research, Institutional, Preferences).
frontend/src/components/AIPaperTrading.t: Page component for the AI Paper Trading tab, displaying open simulated positions filtered by trading modality, a stats panel, and a link to trade history.
frontend/src/components/AIPaperTradingSt: Stats panel component showing overall AI paper trading accuracy metrics (win rate, PnL, trade count) broken down by modality, with a reset/clear history action.
frontend/src/components/AIPerformancePan: Component that displays AI learning engine statistics (accuracy, predictions, learning level) for a specific asset or a ranked list of all assets.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors, displays a user-friendly error card, and offers a reload button that clears service worker caches before refreshing.
frontend/src/components/AssetResearch.ts: A React component that allows users to search and select Binance Futures USD-M assets, displaying market data and a predictive confidence panel for the selected symbol with autocomplete support.
frontend/src/components/BinanceAccountSu: Displays a summary of the user's Binance Futures account including total balance, available balance, and unrealized PnL, with loading/error states and a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/BinanceCredentia: A form component for saving and clearing Binance API and Secret keys, storing them in localStorage with show/hide toggles and validation feedback.
frontend/src/components/CandlestickChart: A canvas-based candlestick chart component that renders OHLC candles with SMC analysis overlays, technical indicators (EMA, Bollinger Bands), and timeframe selection controls.
frontend/src/components/DataStatusIndica: A fixed overlay alert component that displays live data fetch status, staleness warnings, and error messages (including blocked/restricted access) with a retry button.
frontend/src/components/DynamicAlerts.ts: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky header component showing the app title and a conditional PWA install button that opens a PWAInstallDialog.
frontend/src/components/ICPAnalysis.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/IndicatorSubChar: Renders RSI and MACD sub-charts as Canvas elements below the main price chart, drawing grid lines, indicator lines, histogram bars, and labels using raw Canvas 2D API.
frontend/src/components/InstallPrompt.ts: Displays a dismissible banner after 3 seconds prompting the user to install the PWA, opening a PWAInstallDialog when the install button is clicked.
frontend/src/components/InstitutionalOrd: Shows institutional buy/sell signals for BTC Futures (USD-M) and Spot markets fetched via React Query, with loading skeletons, error categorization, and a manual refresh button.
frontend/src/components/MarketCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card for a single Binance market showing price, 24h change badge, volume, and analysis strength with neon styling that reflects bullish/bearish state.
frontend/src/components/MarketOverview.t: Displays a scrollable grid of MarketCards for all Binance Futures markets and shows detailed analysis panels (predictive confidence, AI performance, manipulation zones) for the selected symbol.
frontend/src/components/Opportunities.ts: Renders trading opportunities grouped by modality (scalping, swing, breakout, reversal, SMC, FVG) in a tabbed layout, with a details panel that opens when an opportunity card is clicked.
frontend/src/components/OpportunityDetai: A slide-in side panel component that displays detailed trade setup information for a selected symbol and modality, including current price, price change, and AI-generated trade recommendations.
frontend/src/components/OrderBook.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/PaperTradeCard.t: A card component that renders an individual paper trade's details including symbol, direction, entry price, PnL percentage, take-profit levels hit, and an expandable reference section.
frontend/src/components/PaperTradeHistor: Displays a paginated, filterable list of closed paper trades with modality and direction filters, showing trade details like price, duration, and P&L.
frontend/src/components/PredictiveConfid: Renders a confidence score panel for technical analysis with a gradient progress bar and color-coded badges indicating high, medium, or low confidence levels.
frontend/src/components/PWADiagnosticsVi: A diagnostic card component that displays technical PWA information such as display mode, install prompt status, and service worker state using the usePWADiagnostics hook.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallDialog: A modal dialog that guides users through PWA installation, showing platform-specific instructions for iOS (Safari share sheet) or a direct install button for Android/Chrome.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallStatus: A card component that shows the current PWA installation status (installed, installable, or not supported) with appropriate badges and action buttons based on the device and browser.
frontend/src/components/ResetFromScratch: Alert dialog that confirms and executes a full app reset, clearing AI history, user preferences, and caches, then reloads the app.
frontend/src/components/SMCSignalPanel.t: Displays Smart Money Concepts analysis including order blocks, fair value gaps, structure points, liquidity zones, and market bias with a strength indicator.
frontend/src/components/TabFetchErrorSta: Error state component for tabs that shows error details, a possible PWA cache issue notice, and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/TabPageCard.tsx: Reusable card layout component for tab pages with a neon-styled header supporting icon, title, description, and optional badge.
frontend/src/components/TechnicalIndicat: Compact inline summary bar displaying RSI, MACD, moving average alignment, and Bollinger Bands position with color-coded badges.
frontend/src/components/ThemeProvider.ts: Provides a React context for switching between 'darkNeon' and 'cyberGlow' themes, persisting the selection in localStorage and applying CSS classes to the document root.
frontend/src/components/TopRecommendatio: Displays a ranked list of top asset recommendations by combining live Binance market data with algorithmic recommendation scores, including loading skeletons and error states.
frontend/src/components/TradeInputForm.t: Renders a trade entry form with symbol autocomplete (from Binance futures data), leverage slider, long/short direction toggle, and entry price input.
Settings panel allowing users to select visual themes, toggle alerts, manage favourite assets, and configure AI learning prioritization, with all preferences persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/analysisEnric: Calculates advanced technical analysis for a Binance ticker including trend, support/resistance zones, confidence scoring, manipulation zone detection, and institutional order detection, enriched with learning engine data.
Browser-side module for fetching Binance Futures and Spot data, exporting both legacy string-field ticker shapes and new numeric-field types, with error classification helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/binanceFuture: Fetches Binance USD-M Futures funding rates and open interest from public endpoints, returning partial results on failure. Also provides in-memory session history for detecting metric changes.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/binancePrivat: Provides authenticated Binance Futures API calls using HMAC-signed requests to fetch account balance and open positions, mapping raw API responses to typed interfaces.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/institutional: Detects institutional trading signals from BTC market data using volume and price action heuristics, exposing React Query hooks for both Futures and Spot markets with a backend fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/learningInteg: Records market analysis predictions to the learning engine and updates past predictions with actual prices, prioritizing user-favourited symbols when enabled.
Generates a sorted list of top bullish trade recommendations from market data by filtering on trend, strength, and confidence thresholds.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/opportunityRu: Defines scoring rules to select and rank trading opportunities for scalping and swing strategies from market data based on volume, volatility, momentum, and confidence metrics.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/unifiedSnapsh: Transforms a backend UnifiedSnapshot into frontend BinanceMarketData format by mapping raw market fields to BinanceTicker shape and enriching each ticker with technical analysis.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIPaperTrades.ts: React Query hook that fetches and caches all open AI paper trades with a 5-second refetch interval, supporting optional modality filtering. Also exports a helper to invalidate paper trade queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIPaperTradingEngi: Hook that starts the AI paper trading engine as a singleton on mount, preventing multiple instances across re-renders, and exposes engine running state and control functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceAccount.ts: React Query hook that fetches Binance account balance using stored credentials, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceAuth.ts: Hook that manages Binance API credentials in local state and storage, exposing save and clear functions alongside current credential state.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceCandlestick: React Query hook that fetches Binance OHLCV kline data for a given symbol, timeframe, and limit, refreshing every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceFuturesSymb: React Query hook that fetches active USDT-margined perpetual futures symbols from Binance, falling back to a hardcoded list on failure, cached for 1 hour.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinancePositions.t: React Query hook that fetches open Binance futures positions every 8 seconds, skipping retries on auth errors, and exposes a last-updated timestamp.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and exposing identity and status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useOpportunities.ts: React Query hook that derives grouped trading opportunities (scalping, swing, breakout, reversal, SMC, FVG) from live Binance market data using deterministic selection rules.
React Query hook that fetches closed paper trades and their summary statistics, and exposes a mutation to clear all trade history.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWADiagnostics.ts: Hook that asynchronously checks PWA readiness by inspecting display mode, service worker state, manifest availability, and critical icon accessibility, returning a structured diagnostics object with issues list.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Hook that tracks PWA installability state by listening for beforeinstallprompt and appinstalled events, detecting iOS devices and standalone display mode, and providing a prompt trigger and dismissal mechanism.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines the primary `useBinanceMarketData` React Query hook that fetches, filters, and enriches Binance Futures market data with technical analysis, learning integration, and recommendation generation. Also exports shared TypeScript interfaces for market data, technical analysis, and related types.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceWorkerUpdat: Hook that detects when a new service worker is waiting and exposes `isUpdateAvailable` and `updateAndReload` to prompt the user to apply the update via SKIP_WAITING.
frontend/src/hooks/useSMCAnalysis.ts: Memoized hook that runs Smart Money Concepts (SMC) analysis on an array of Binance kline candles, returning order blocks, fair value gaps, structure points, liquidity zones, and market bias.
frontend/src/hooks/useTechnicalIndicator: Memoized hook that computes all technical indicators from Binance kline candles using `calculateAllIndicators`, returning null if fewer than 30 candles are available.
frontend/src/hooks/useTradeRecommendatio: Hook that derives a trade recommendation for a selected symbol and modality by locating the asset in market data and calling `computeTradeRecommendation`, returning the result and a readiness flag.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for a dark trading-terminal theme (neon greens/reds, panel borders, chart colors), and adds utility classes for monospace fonts, price colors, and glow effects.
frontend/src/lib/aiPaperTradingEngine.ts: Autonomous paper trading engine that polls Binance Futures tickers every 8 seconds, scores symbols per modality, opens/manages/closes fictitious leveraged trades with per-modality TP/SL multipliers, and maintains a cached ticker map with fallback symbols.
frontend/src/lib/binanceAuth.ts: Utility module for storing/retrieving Binance API credentials in localStorage and building HMAC-SHA256 signed request URLs using the Web Crypto API.
frontend/src/lib/fallbackSymbols.ts: Exports a hardcoded list of 100 Binance USD-M perpetual futures symbols used as a fallback when the Binance API is unavailable.
frontend/src/lib/learningEngine.ts: Implements a continuous learning engine that stores prediction records and asset accuracy stats in IndexedDB, and adaptively adjusts indicator weights (SMC, volumeDelta, liquidity, FVG) based on historical prediction outcomes.
frontend/src/lib/paperTradeStorage.ts: Provides IndexedDB-backed storage for AI paper trades, including functions to add, update, close, and summarize open and historical trades across multiple trading modalities.
frontend/src/lib/positionAlerts.ts: Manages position PnL alert thresholds via localStorage and provides utility functions to compute PnL percentage and determine whether an alert should be shown for a given position.
frontend/src/lib/resetFromScratch.ts: Orchestrates a full app data reset by clearing IndexedDB databases, localStorage, CacheStorage, and unregistering service workers, with helpers to detect post-reset success and trigger a clean reload.
frontend/src/lib/smcIndicators.ts: Implements Smart Money Concepts (SMC) technical analysis, detecting order blocks, fair value gaps, market structure points (BOS/CHoCH), liquidity zones, and premium/discount zones from OHLCV candle data.
frontend/src/lib/technicalIndicators.ts: Calculates standard technical indicators—RSI, MACD, EMA/SMA moving averages, and Bollinger Bands—from candle data, returning current values and directional signals for each.
frontend/src/lib/tradeRecommendation.ts: Computes trade recommendations (entry, take-profit, stop-loss, direction) from Binance market data using modality-specific risk/reward parameters (scalping, swing, breakout, etc.) entirely on the frontend without backend calls.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark trading-terminal theme with neon colors, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono, Orbitron), neon box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a crypto trading platform on ICP with a Motoko backend and React/TypeScript frontend, tracking existing features, architectural notes, and versioning metadata.
